backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and endpoints for director registration, user profiles, technician search, and tribal leader roles, with access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old UserProfile records (with name/areaOfExpertise/professionalDesignation fields) into the new UserProfile schema with expanded fields, resetting all values to defaults.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs and titles to their corresponding source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AD TRIBE app, loading Inter and Bebas Neue fonts and mounting the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application router using TanStack Router, defining all routes (landing, profile, dashboard, connections, registration flows) with auth guards and rendering them inside AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Availab: A monthly calendar component that allows users to toggle individual dates as available/unavailable, with read-only mode support and navigation between months.
A simple legend component displaying color-coded indicators for Available, Booked, and Unavailable calendar states.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The main application layout component providing a sticky header with logo, user profile avatar, login/logout button, and a footer wrapping page content.
frontend/src/components/profile/UserProf: A slide-in panel for viewing and editing a user's profile details and availability calendar, with inline validation and mutation hooks for saving changes.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Locatio: A placeholder card component for location profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Product: A placeholder card component for production house profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Profess: Displays a read-only view of a user's professional advertising registration details (name, city, department, designation, experience) fetched via query hooks, with a fallback to register if none exists.
frontend/src/components/profiles/VendorP: A placeholder card component for equipment vendor profiles that redirects users to the registration flow.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty file, previously a profile setup modal component that has been removed or cleared.
frontend/src/components/registration/Dir: A multi-step director registration form featuring a custom date range picker calendar and submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/registration/Inl: Multi-step inline registration form for advertising professionals, including department/designation selectors, an availability date picker calendar, and form submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/registration/Pro: Registration form for production houses that collects company details, executive producers (up to 3), work reel URL, and industry reference email, with validation and submission via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/search/ProviderC: Displays a card for a single search result provider showing name, type, description, and up to 4 tags with an overflow badge.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: A controlled text input component with a search icon for querying providers by name or keyword.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchFil: A filter panel with a dropdown to filter search results by provider type (all, professional, vendor, or location).
frontend/src/components/search/SearchRes: Renders search results or a skeleton loading grid; currently shows an empty/no-results state as the data-fetching logic is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/components/TribalLeaderRegi: Modal component that lets authenticated users choose between Director or Production House roles and navigates them to the corresponding registration page.
frontend/src/components/tribe/TribeAvail: Form for directors or production houses to search for available technicians by project details, shoot dates, city, and selected roles, submitting the query via a search mutation hook.
Displays technician search results split into same-city and other-city matches, each rendered as a card with name, role, city, and contact number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/clear functions, identity state, and login status derived from DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile CRUD, availability updates, technician search, and tribal leader role queries, plus local enum/type stubs for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining AD TRIBE's design token variables (colors, radius) for both light and dark modes, plus base typography styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectionsPage.tsx: Displays a list of verified AD TRIBE community members fetched from the backend, showing their principals with a 'Verified' badge and loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page with navigation cards linking to the user's profile and the connections/tribe member list.
frontend/src/pages/DirectorRegistrationP: Page wrapping the DirectorRegistrationForm component, navigating to a success route on completion.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Main marketing landing page featuring feature cards, stats, inline registration, tribe availability enquiry form, and access-gated tribal leader functionality with dialogs for unauthenticated or unauthorized users.
frontend/src/pages/ProductionHouseRegist: Page wrapping the ProductionHouseRegistrationForm component, navigating to a success route on completion.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's AD TRIBE profile, including account info and professional registration details (name, city, department, designation, experience, etc.) with loading skeletons and a navigation button to edit the profile.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationPage.tsx: Renders the 'Join the Tribe' registration page, embedding the InlineRegistrationForm and navigating to the success page upon successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/RegistrationSuccessPa: Confirmation page shown after successful registration, displaying a success message and buttons to navigate to the dashboard or profile page.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Utility functions for converting between ICP nanosecond timestamps (Time) and JavaScript Date objects, checking same-day equality, formatting dates, and generating date ranges.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback for persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the AD TRIBE design system, including custom brand colors (saffron, forest, gold), display/body font families, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state document describing the AD TRIBE platform's current features, architecture, and version, tracking implemented functionality such as profile avatar display, profile panel, availability calendar integration, and backend wiring.
